productDisplayName: 2go Active Gear USA Men Pack Of 3 T-shirt
description: Set of threeSoft, absorbent, inner t-shirts made of 100% premium combed cotton with Lycra used for the neck to prevent de-shaping, has a round high neck, short sleeves, print on the inner neck for tag-less comfort and signature branding on the left chest.
